ticket.summary: Laptop loses audio whenever VPN reconnects mid-call. Happens in both Teams and Zoom,
ticket.raw_dump:
Ticket Number: T20260218.0100
Title: Teams call drops after VPN reconnect

Contact Info
Name: Jordan Lee
Email: jordan.lee@example.com
Phone: 555-010-5555

Description
Laptop loses audio whenever VPN reconnects mid-call. Happens in both Teams and Zoom,
usually after 30 minutes on hotel Wi-Fi. User rebooted twice and reinstalled the VPN
client last week. Need confirmation that the NIC drivers are current.

Troubleshooting Notes
- Gathered screenshots from Teams notifications.
- Verified ticket generated from mobile email.
- Pending output from systeminfo.
